Constructor for step_winsorize

Source: R/map_recipe_timewise.R
step_winsorize_new.Rd

This is a low-level constructor for the step_winsorize preprocessing step. It is called internally by step_winsorize() and is not intended to be used directly by users.

Usage

step_winsorize_new(terms, role, trained, probs, winsor_limits, skip, id)

Arguments

terms

A list of quosures generated by rlang::enquos() specifying which columns to transform.

role

Not used by this step as no new variables are created. Included for consistency with the recipes API.

trained

A logical indicating whether the step has been trained. When TRUE, winsor_limits must be provided.

probs

A numeric vector of length 2 indicating the lower and upper quantile probabilities used for winsorization.

winsor_limits

A named list of length-two numeric vectors (per variable) with the computed quantile cutoffs (added during prep()).

skip

A logical. Should the step be skipped when the recipe is baked by recipes::bake()? Defaults to FALSE.

id

A character string that uniquely identifies the step.

Value

An object of class step_winsorize.

On this page
